name: Fix-loop (sequential reveal)
scenario_summary: Multi-turn fix loop. Setup shows first 2 fix rounds completed (Fix 1: SyntaxError colon; Fix 2: toml→tomllib API swap). Turn 7 reveals third error (dict.get keyword argument). Task = produce Fix 3 as unified diff. After agent's fix, harness applies patch, runs build, injects next error or 'BUILD GREEN'. Max 10 turns to reach green. Grader: binary build-pass + turns-to-success.

canonical_fix.description: Remove default= keyword; pass as positional arg.

expected_fix_sequence.canonical_fix_summary: Ensure return type is int (not str). Adjust default value type if test asserts int.

build_green_criteria.description: All tests in test_loader.py pass. Stdout contains 'passed' and no FAILED/ERROR.

primary_metric.description: Composite of build-pass binary and turns-to-green.
primary_metric.formula: if build_green within max_turns: score = 1 - 0.05 * (turns_used - optimal_turns) ; else 0. optimal_turns = 2 remaining rounds = 2 extra turns from current state.

one_patch_per_turn.description: Each agent turn proposes exactly one diff (no multi-patch bundles).
